title: Manual-input approval decision
description: Decision record persisted at approvals/<state>-<attempt>-decision.json for a manual-input (:approval) node. The runtime matches :decision against the node's :transitions :when {:decision "..."} to advance the run.

state.description: Workflow state id of the approval node.

decision.description: Free-form label matched against transition :when {:decision ...}. Common values: approve, changes-requested.

summary.description: Optional human comment summarizing the decision.
